content_en:
manner that is suitable to His Perfection, Greatness, and Majesty)) the Throne. On that day, Adam was created, and on that day, the Hour will come to pass.” (Related by Imam Ash-Shaafi’ee in his Musnad)

Anas 4: related that the Messenger of Allah 2 said, “Jibreel came to me and in his hand there was a white mirror, upon which there was a black dot. I said, ‘What is this, O Jibreel?’ He said, ‘This is Jurmu‘ah (Friday), which Allah has presented to you, so that it is a ‘Eed (holiday) for you and for your people after you. You will be first, and then the Jews and the Christians will be after you.”

The Prophet # said, “And what is the Day of Al-Mazeed?” He said, “Verily, your Lord has taken a vast valley in Paradise, which is made of white musk. On the day of Friday, Allah 3 will descend from... onto His Kursee (Footstool). Then His Kursce will be surrounded by pulpits of light, and the Prophets will come and sit on them. Then the pulpits will be surrounded by chairs made of gold, and then the truthful ones and the martyrs will come and sit on them. Then the people of Paradise will come until they sit on the Kath (dune). Then their Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) will appear to them, until they look at His Countenance, and He will say, ‘I am the One Who fulfilled and completed for you My Favor, and this is the place of My Honor, so ask Me. Then they will ask Him until their wishes end. And He will grant them at that point that which no eye has seen, which no ear has heard, and which has not occurred to the heart of any human being. Then He will remain until the time when people will leave from Friday. Then Allah 4% will ascend onto His Kursee, and the martyrs and the truthful ones will ascend with Him. (Here the narrator says, ‘and I think he said’) And the people of the rooms

704 Book of The End: Great Trials and ‘Tribulations

Hudhaifah related that the Messenger of Allah #% said, “Jibreel came to me and mentioned the day of Al-Mazeed (“even more’)... The first words that they will hear from Allah are, ‘Where are my slaves who obeyed Me regarding the unseen and they had not seen Me? And (those slaves) who obeyed My Messengers and believed in My Matter? Ask Me, for this is the Day of Al-Mazeed.’ They will gather upon one word, ‘We are indeed pleased, so be pleased with us.’ He will return to His saying, ‘O people of Paradise, had I not been pleased with you, I would not have had you inhabit My Paradise. This is the Day of Al-Mazeed, so ask Me.’ Then they will gather upon one word, ‘Show us Your Countenance, O our Lord, so that we will look at You.’ Then Allah will remove the screens. And such light of His will appear to them that, were in not that Allah decreed for them not to die, they would have been burned. Then Allah will say to them, ‘Return to your abodes, and they will return to their abodes, And they will have (such) a day every seven days, and that is the day of Friday.” (Related by Al-Bazzaar},

The Mention Of The Marketplace Of Paradise

Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations 705

pulpits of silver. The lowest of them — and there is no lowest among them — is on a Kuthbaan (dune) of musk and Kaafoor. They will not think that the people of the chairs have a better seating than they do.” Abu Hurairah 4 said, “I said, ‘O Messenger of Allah, will we see our Lord?’’”’ The Prophet 2% said, “Yes, do you quarrel about seeing the sun and (about seeing) the moon on the night of a full moon?” Abu Hurairah ¢ said, “We said, ‘No.’” He 2% said, “Then likewise you will not quarrel about seeing your Lord. And there are none in that gathering except that He ## will address them with a speech. He ## will say, ‘O so-and-so, do you remember the day you did such and such deed?’ And that person will remember some of his treacheries in the world. He will say, “Yes, but did You not forgive me.’ He %% will say, ‘Yes, and by My Forgiveness, you reached this station of yours.’ While they will be upon that state, a cloud will cover them from above, and it will rain perfume down on them, and it will have a fragrance, the likes of which they will have never before scented. Then our Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) will say, ‘Stand to what I have prepared for you in terms of honor, and take that which you desire. Then they will find a Soog (marketplace) which is surrounded by angels. What is in that marketplace no eye has seen the likes of, no ear has heard (the likes of), and no heart has imagined (the likes of). Whatever we desire will be carried to us; nothing will be bought therein, nor will anything be sold. In that Seog, the people of Paradise will meet one another. One of high uniform will go and he will meet one who is lower than him — and there is no one who is lowly therein. The latter will be very much delighted by the attire and form of the former, and he will not finish talking to him until he imagines an even better outfit upon himself, and that is because it is not suitable for anyone to be grieved in Paradise. Then we will return to our abodes, where our wives will meet us. They will say, ‘Welcome, welcome to our love. You have come, and upon you is more beauty and fragrance than you parted us with.’ And we will say, ‘We were in the company of our Lord, the Ali-Mighty, ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty), so we are deserving of changing in the way we have changed.” (Related by Al-Haafiz Abu Bakr ibn Abee ‘Aasim) ibn Maajah and At-Tirmidhee related it through their own tespective chains. And At-Tirmidhee said, “Ghareeb, we do not know it except in this form,” And Abu Bakr ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa related it through yet another chain.

706 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

Anas ibn Maalik #&-related that the Messenger of Allah #¢ said, “Verily, in Paradise there is a Seog (marketplace) that they go to every Friday. Then the wind of the left will-blow, and it will pour upon their faces and their garments. Thus they will increase in grace and beauty. Then they will return to their wives, after having increased in grace and beauty. And their wives will say to them, ‘By Allah, after leaving us, you have increased in grace and beauty.’ And they will say, ‘And you, by Allah, have indeed increased, since we left you, in grace and beauty.” (Muslim) Ahmad related the same through a different chain, though’ his narration has the following beginning: “Verily, there is a Soog (Marketplace) in Paradise, and in it there is a Kuthbaan (dune) of musk. When they go

The Ground Of Paradise As Well As The Goodness And Spreading Of Its Good Fragrance

Abu Hurairah 4 reported that the Prophet # said, “the earth of Paradise is white; its wide plane consists of rocks of Al-Kaafoor, and it is surrounded by musk, which are like sand dunes. In it are steady rivers. Therein the people of Paradise gather and become acquainted with one another. And then Allah will send the wind of mercy, which will stir up a good fragrance upon them. A man will return to his wife, and will have increased in beauty and fragrance. She will say to him, ‘You left me, and I was pleased with you, and | am now even more pleased with you.” (Related by Abu Bakr ibn Abee Shaibah)

In a hadith found in AfTirntidhee, “Alee # related that the Messenger of Allah # said, “Verily, in Paradise there is a Marketplace, but there occurs no buying or selling therein. Instead, there are only appearances of men and women, and so if a man desires an appearance, he enters into it.” (At-Tirmidhee)

It must be understood that this hadith is Ghareeb, as At-Tirmidhee ~ may Allah have mercy on him —~ pointed out. At any rate, it is taken to mean that men will only desire to enter into appearances of men; similarly, women will only desire to enter into appearances of women. Therefore, this hadith becomes an explanation of the previous one, And that is referring to one’s form, shape, outfit, clothing — which we have mentioned in the hadith of Abu Hurairah 4 in regards to the Soog of Paradise: “One of high attire
content_id:
dengan cara yang sesuai dengan Kesempurnaan, Keagungan, dan Kemuliaan-Nya) Singgasana. Pada hari itu, Adam diciptakan, dan pada hari itu pula, Hari Kiamat akan tiba.' (Diriwayatkan oleh Imam Asy-Syafi'i dalam Musnad-nya)

Anas (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Jibril datang kepadaku dan di tangannya ada cermin putih, yang di atasnya terdapat titik hitam. Aku berkata, 'Apakah ini, wahai Jibril?' Ia berkata, 'Ini adalah Jumu'ah (Jumat), yang Allah telah hadiahkan kepadamu, sehingga ia menjadi 'Eid (hari raya) bagimu dan bagi umatmu setelahmu. Engkau akan menjadi yang pertama, kemudian orang-orang Yahudi dan Nasrani akan menyusul setelahmu.'

Nabi bersabda, 'Dan apakah Hari Al-Mazid itu?' Ia berkata, 'Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu telah mengambil sebuah lembah yang luas di Surga, yang terbuat dari misk putih. Pada hari Jumat, Allah akan turun dari... ke atas Kursi-Nya (Pijakan Kaki-Nya). Kemudian Kursi-Nya akan dikelilingi oleh mimbar-mimbar dari cahaya, dan para Nabi akan datang dan duduk di atasnya. Kemudian mimbar-mimbar itu akan dikelilingi oleh kursi-kursi dari emas, dan kemudian orang-orang yang jujur (shiddiqin) dan para syuhada akan datang dan duduk di atasnya. Kemudian penghuni Surga akan datang hingga mereka duduk di atas Kathib (bukit pasir). Kemudian Tuhan mereka 'Azza Wa-Jall (Kepada-Nya segala Kemuliaan dan Keagungan) akan menampakkan diri kepada mereka, hingga mereka memandang Wajah-Nya, dan Dia akan berkata, 'Akulah Yang telah memenuhi dan menyempurnakan bagi kamu Nikmat-Ku, dan inilah tempat Kehormatan-Ku, maka mintalah kepada-Ku.' Kemudian mereka akan meminta kepada-Nya hingga keinginan-keinginan mereka habis. Dan Dia akan menganugerahkan kepada mereka pada saat itu apa yang belum pernah dilihat mata, yang belum pernah didengar telinga, dan yang belum pernah terlintas di hati manusia mana pun. Kemudian Dia akan tetap (bersama mereka) hingga tiba waktu orang-orang beranjak dari hari Jumat. Kemudian Allah akan naik ke atas Kursi-Nya, dan para syuhada serta orang-orang yang jujur akan naik bersama-Nya. (Di sini perawi berkata, 'Dan aku pikir beliau berkata') Dan para penghuni kamar-kamar (meninggalkan)

704 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar

Hudzaifah meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Jibril datang kepadaku dan menyebutkan tentang hari Al-Mazid ('bahkan lebih')... Kata-kata pertama yang akan mereka dengar dari Allah adalah, 'Di mana hamba-hamba-Ku yang taat kepada-Ku dalam perkara yang gaib dan mereka belum pernah melihat-Ku? Dan (hamba-hamba) yang taat kepada para Rasul-Ku dan beriman kepada Urusan-Ku? Mintalah kepada-Ku, karena ini adalah Hari Al-Mazid.' Mereka akan berhimpun dalam satu kata, 'Kami sungguh-sungguh ridha, maka ridhailah kami.' Dia akan kembali ke sabda-Nya, 'Wahai penghuni Surga, seandainya Aku tidak ridha kepada kamu, tentu Aku tidak akan menjadikan kamu menghuni Surga-Ku. Ini adalah Hari Al-Mazid, maka mintalah kepada-Ku.' Kemudian mereka akan berhimpun dalam satu kata, 'Tunjukkan kepada kami Wajah-Mu, wahai Tuhan kami, agar kami dapat memandang-Mu.' Kemudian Allah akan menyingkapkan tabir-tabir itu. Dan cahaya-Nya yang demikian akan menampakkan diri kepada mereka, sehingga kalaulah bukan karena Allah menetapkan bagi mereka untuk tidak mati, tentulah mereka akan terbakar. Kemudian Allah akan berkata kepada mereka, 'Kembalilah ke tempat tinggal kamu,' dan mereka akan kembali ke tempat tinggal mereka. Dan mereka akan memiliki (hari yang seperti itu) setiap tujuh hari, dan itulah hari Jumat.' (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Bazzar)

Penyebutan Pasar Surga

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar 705

mimbar-mimbar dari perak. Yang paling rendah di antara mereka — dan tidak ada yang terendah di antara mereka — berada di atas gundukan misk dan kapur barus. Mereka tidak akan berpikir bahwa penghuni kursi-kursi memiliki tempat duduk yang lebih baik dari mereka.' Abu Hurairah (ra) berkata, 'Aku berkata, 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah kami akan melihat Tuhan kami?' Nabi bersabda, 'Ya, apakah kamu berselisih tentang melihat matahari dan (tentang melihat) bulan pada malam bulan purnama?' Abu Hurairah (ra) berkata, 'Kami berkata, 'Tidak.'' Beliau bersabda, 'Maka demikian pula kamu tidak akan berselisih tentang melihat Tuhan kamu. Dan tidak ada seorang pun dalam pertemuan itu kecuali Dia akan menyapanya dengan sebuah ucapan. Dia akan berkata, 'Wahai si Fulan, apakah kamu ingat hari kamu melakukan perbuatan tertentu?' Dan orang itu akan mengingat beberapa pengkhianatan di dunianya. Ia akan berkata, 'Ya, namun apakah Engkau tidak mengampuniku?' Dia akan berkata, 'Ya, dan dengan Pengampunan-Ku, kamu sampai ke kedudukan ini.' Ketika mereka sedang dalam keadaan seperti itu, awan akan menyelimuti mereka dari atas, dan ia akan menghujani wewangian kepada mereka, dan ia akan memiliki semerbak wangi, yang seperti itu belum pernah mereka cium sebelumnya. Kemudian Tuhan kami 'Azza Wa-Jall (Kepada-Nya segala Kemuliaan dan Keagungan) akan berkata, 'Bangkitlah menuju apa yang Aku siapkan untuk kamu berupa kehormatan, dan ambillah apa yang kamu inginkan.' Kemudian mereka akan menemukan sebuah Sug (pasar) yang dikelilingi oleh para malaikat. Apa yang ada di dalam pasar itu belum pernah dilihat mata yang serupa dengannya, belum pernah didengar telinga (yang serupa dengannya), dan tidak pernah terbayangkan oleh hati (yang serupa dengannya). Apapun yang kami inginkan akan dibawa kepada kami; tidak ada yang dibeli di sana, dan tidak ada pula yang dijual. Di dalam Sug tersebut, penghuni Surga akan saling bertemu. Seseorang yang berpakaian indah akan datang dan ia akan bertemu seseorang yang lebih rendah darinya — dan tidak ada yang hina di sana. Orang yang disebut terakhir akan sangat terkesan dengan pakaian dan penampilan orang yang disebut pertama, dan ia belum selesai berbicara dengannya sebelum ia membayangkan pakaian yang bahkan lebih baik pada dirinya sendiri, dan itu karena tidak sepantasnya seseorang berduka di Surga. Kemudian kami akan kembali ke tempat tinggal kami, di mana istri-istri kami akan menyambut kami. Mereka akan berkata, 'Selamat datang, selamat datang bagi orang yang kami cintai. Engkau telah datang, dan padamu ada keindahan dan wewangian yang lebih dari ketika kamu meninggalkan kami.' Dan kami akan berkata, 'Kami berada di hadapan Tuhan kami, Yang Maha Mulia, 'Azza Wa-Jall (Kepada-Nya segala Kemuliaan dan Keagungan), maka sepantasnya kami berubah seperti yang kami berubah.' (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Hafiz Abu Bakr ibn Abi 'Asim) Ibn Majah dan At-Tirmidzi meriwayatkannya melalui sanad masing-masing. Dan At-Tirmidzi berkata, 'Gharib, kami tidak mengetahuinya kecuali dalam bentuk ini.' Dan Abu Bakr ibn Abi Ad-Dunya meriwayatkannya melalui sanad yang lain lagi.

706 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar

Anas ibn Malik (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Sesungguhnya di Surga ada sebuah Sug (pasar) yang mereka kunjungi setiap Jumat. Kemudian angin dari sebelah kiri akan berhembus, dan ia akan menyiram wajah-wajah mereka dan pakaian-pakaian mereka. Maka mereka akan bertambah dalam keindahan dan keelokan. Kemudian mereka akan kembali kepada istri-istri mereka, setelah bertambah dalam keindahan dan keelokan. Dan istri-istri mereka akan berkata kepada mereka, 'Demi Allah, setelah meninggalkan kami, kamu bertambah dalam keindahan dan keelokan.' Dan mereka akan berkata, 'Dan kamu, demi Allah, sungguh-sungguh telah bertambah, sejak kami meninggalkanmu, dalam keindahan dan keelokan.' (Muslim) Ahmad meriwayatkan hal yang sama melalui sanad yang berbeda, meskipun riwayatnya memiliki awal sebagai berikut: 'Sesungguhnya ada sebuah Sug (Pasar) di Surga, dan di dalamnya ada sebuah gundukan misk. Ketika mereka pergi'

Bumi Surga Serta Kebaikan dan Meluasnya Wewangian Baiknya

Abu Hurairah (ra) melaporkan bahwa Nabi bersabda, 'Bumi Surga berwarna putih; hamparan luasnya terdiri dari bebatuan Al-Kapur, dan dikelilingi oleh misk, yang seperti gundukan-gundukan pasir. Di dalamnya terdapat sungai-sungai yang tetap. Di dalamnya penghuni Surga berkumpul dan saling berkenalan. Kemudian Allah akan mengirimkan angin rahmat, yang akan mengaduk-aduk wewangian yang baik kepada mereka. Seorang pria akan kembali kepada istrinya, dan akan bertambah keindahan dan wewanginya. Dia akan berkata kepadanya, 'Engkau meninggalkanku, dan aku ridha kepadamu, dan sekarang aku lebih ridha kepadamu.' (Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Bakr ibn Abi Syaibah)

Dalam sebuah hadis yang terdapat dalam At-Tirmidzi, 'Ali (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Sesungguhnya di Surga ada sebuah Pasar, namun tidak terjadi jual beli di dalamnya. Sebaliknya, hanya ada penampilan-penampilan pria dan wanita, sehingga jika seorang pria menginginkan suatu penampilan, ia masuk ke dalamnya.' (At-Tirmidzi)

Perlu dipahami bahwa hadis ini adalah Gharib, sebagaimana At-Tirmidzi — semoga Allah merahmati beliau — telah menunjukkan. Bagaimanapun, hadis ini dimaknai bahwa kaum pria hanya akan menginginkan untuk masuk ke dalam penampilan pria; demikian pula, kaum wanita hanya akan menginginkan untuk masuk ke dalam penampilan wanita. Oleh karena itu, hadis ini menjadi penjelasan atas hadis sebelumnya. Dan itu merujuk pada bentuk, penampilan, pakaian seseorang — yang telah kami sebutkan dalam hadis Abu Hurairah (ra) tentang Sug Surga: 'Seseorang yang berpakaian indah'
content_ar: manner that is suitable to His Perfection, Greatness, and Majesty)) the Throne. On that day, آدم was created, and on that day, the Hour will come to pass.” (Related by الإمام Ash-Shaafi’ee in his Musnad) أنس 4: related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2 said, “Jibreel came to me and in his hand there was a white mirror, upon which there was a black dot. I said, ‘What is this, O Jibreel?’ قال, ‘This is Jurmu‘ah (Friday), which الله has presented to you, لذا that it is a ‘Eed (holiday) for you and for your people بعد you. You will be أولاً, and then the Jews and the Christians will be بعد you.” النبي ﷺ # said, “And what is the Day of Al-Mazeed?” قال, “Verily, your Lord has taken a vast valley in الجنة, which is made of white musk. On the day of Friday, الله 3 will descend from... onto His Kursee (Footstool). Then His Kursce will be surrounded by pulpits of light, and the الأنبياء will come and sit on them. Then the pulpits will be surrounded by chairs made of gold, and then the truthful ones and the martyrs will come and sit on them. Then the people of الجنة will come حتى they sit on the Kath (dune). Then their Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) will appear to them, حتى they look at His Countenance, and He will say, ‘I am the One Who fulfilled and completed for you My النعمة, and this is the place of My الشرف, لذا ask Me. Then they will ask Him حتى their wishes end. And He will grant them at that point that which no eye has seen, which no ear has heard, and which has not occurred to the القلب of any human being. Then He will remain حتى the time عندما people will leave from Friday. Then الله 4% will ascend onto His Kursee, and the martyrs and the truthful ones will ascend with Him. (Here the narrator says, ‘and I think قال’) And the people of the rooms 704 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and ‘Tribulations Hudhaifah related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said, “Jibreel came to me and mentioned the day of Al-Mazeed (“even more’)... The أولاً words that they will hear from الله are, ‘Where are my slaves who obeyed Me فيما يخص the unseen and they had not seen Me? And (those slaves) who obeyed My الرسل and believed in My Matter? Ask Me, for this is the Day of Al-Mazeed.’ They will gather upon one word, ‘We are indeed pleased, لذا be pleased with us.’ He will return to His saying, ‘O people of الجنة, had I not been pleased with you, I would not have had you inhabit My الجنة. This is the Day of Al-Mazeed, لذا ask Me.’ Then they will gather upon one word, ‘Show us Your Countenance, O our Lord, لذا that we will look at You.’ Then الله will remove the screens. And such light of His will appear to them that, were in not that الله decreed for them not to die, they would have been burned. Then الله will say to them, ‘Return to your abodes, and they will return to their abodes, And they will have (such) a day every seven days, and that is the day of Friday.” (Related by Al-Bazzaar}, The Mention Of The Marketplace Of الجنة الكتاب of The End : Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 705 pulpits of silver. The lowest of them — and there is no lowest among them — is on a Kuthbaan (dune) of musk and Kaafoor. They will not think that the people of the chairs have a better seating than they do.” أبو هريرة 4 said, “I said, ‘O Messenger of الله, will we see our Lord?’’”’ النبي ﷺ 2% said, “Yes, do you quarrel about seeing the sun and (about seeing) the moon on the night of a full moon?” أبو هريرة ¢ said, “We said, ‘No.’” He 2% said, “Then likewise you will not quarrel about seeing your Lord. And there are none in that gathering except that He ## will address them with a speech. He ## will say, ‘O لذا-and-لذا, do you remember the day you did such and such deed?’ And that person will remember some of his treacheries in the الدنيا. He will say, “Yes, but did You not forgive me.’ He %% will say, ‘Yes, and by My المغفرة, you reached this station of yours.’ بينما they will be upon that state, a cloud will cover them from above, and it will rain perfume down on them, and it will have a fragrance, the likes of which they will have never قبل scented. Then our Lord ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) will say, ‘Stand to what I have prepared for you in terms of الشرف, and take that which you desire. Then they will find a Soog (marketplace) which is surrounded by الملائكة. What is in that marketplace no eye has seen the likes of, no ear has heard (the likes of), and no القلب has imagined (the likes of). Whatever we desire will be carried to us; nothing will be bought therein, nor will anything be sold. In that Seog, the people of الجنة will meet بعضهم بعضاً. One of high uniform will go and he will meet one who is lower than him — and there is no one who is lowly therein. The latter will be very much delighted by the attire and form of the former, and he will not finish talking to him حتى he imagines an even better outfit upon himself, and that is لأن it is not suitable for anyone to be grieved in الجنة. Then we will return to our abodes, where our wives will meet us. They will say, ‘Welcome, welcome to our المحبة. You have come, and upon you is more beauty and fragrance than you parted us with.’ And we will say, ‘We were in the company of our Lord, the علي-Mighty, ‘Azza Wa-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty), لذا we are deserving of changing in the الطريق we have changed.” (Related by Al-Haafiz أبو بكر ibn Abee ‘Aasim) ibn Maajah and At-Tirmidhee related it through their own tespective chains. And At-Tirmidhee said, “Ghareeb, we do not know it except in this form,” And أبو بكر ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa related it through yet another chain. 706 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations أنس ibn Maalik #&-related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #¢ said, “Verily, in الجنة there is a Seog (marketplace) that they go to every Friday. Then the wind of the left will-blow, and it will pour upon their faces and their garments. وهكذا they will increase in الفضل and beauty. Then they will return to their wives, بعد having increased in الفضل and beauty. And their wives will say to them, ‘By الله, بعد leaving us, you have increased in الفضل and beauty.’ And they will say, ‘And you, by الله, have indeed increased, بما أن we left you, in الفضل and beauty.” (مسلم) أحمد related the same through a different chain, though’ his narration has the following beginning: “Verily, there is a Soog (Marketplace) in الجنة, and in it there is a Kuthbaan (dune) of musk. عندما they go The Ground Of الجنة As Well As The Goodness And Spreading Of Its الخير Fragrance أبو هريرة 4 reported that النبي ﷺ # said, “the earth of الجنة is white; its wide plane consists of rocks of Al-Kaafoor, and it is surrounded by musk, which are like sand dunes. In it are steady rivers. Therein the people of الجنة gather and become acquainted with بعضهم بعضاً. And then الله will send the wind of الرحمة, which will stir up a الخير fragrance upon them. A man will return to his الزوجة, and will have increased in beauty and fragrance. She will say to him, ‘You left me, and I was pleased with you, and | am now even more pleased with you.” (Related by أبو بكر ibn Abee Shaibah) In a الحديث found in AfTirntidhee, “Alee # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله # said, “Verily, in الجنة there is a Marketplace, but there occurs no buying or selling therein. Instead, there are only appearances of men and women, and لذا إذا a man desires an appearance, he enters into it.” (At-Tirmidhee) It must be understood that this الحديث is Ghareeb, as At-Tirmidhee ~ may الله have الرحمة on him —~ pointed out. At any rate, it is taken to mean that men will only desire to enter into appearances of men; similarly, women will only desire to enter into appearances of women. لذلك, this الحديث becomes an explanation of the previous one, And that is referring to one’s form, shape, outfit, clothing — which we have mentioned in the الحديث of أبو هريرة 4 in regards to the Soog of الجنة: “One of high attire
